name: CommandRecord
summary: Represents the definition of a command in the GUI system

properties.name: CanToggle
properties.summary: Specifies if the command can toggle

properties.name: DisplayName
properties.summary: The text to be displayed for this command

properties.name: ExtendedToolTip
properties.summary: The extended tooltip to be displayed for this command

properties.name: Icon
properties.summary: The 16x16 icon to be displayed for this command

properties.name: Id
properties.summary: The full Id of the command. This is a combination of and Plugin.Id

properties.name: LargeIcon
properties.summary: The 32x32 icon to be displayed for this command

properties.name: Shortcut
properties.summary: Specifies the keyboard shortcut for the command.

properties.name: ShortcutWindowTypes
properties.summary: The Ids of the windows for which the shortcut is valid. Multiple Ids can be specified by separating with ";". If Ids are specified the shortcut should be valid in all contexts.

properties.name: ToolTip
properties.summary: The tooltip to be displayed for this command
